question:
Controller connection broken after updating Z-Wave JS UI

I connect to my controller over the network using ser2net. After updating from 13.10.1 to a newer version, the driver fails to start. Rolling back fixes it.

RF region switches back to Europe (Long Range) on its own

I set the region of my controller to USA (Long Range), but after a restart it is EU (LR) again. How do I make this stick?

Show which nodes are unreachable

It would be great if there was an API to figure out which devices in the network are dead or unreachable, so applications can highlight them.

Read firmware from a device

Is it possible to download the currently installed firmware image from a Z-Wave device, e.g. to clone it onto another device?

Using zwave-js as a secondary controller

I want to run zwave-js as a secondary controller in a network managed by another hub, but inclusion and the interview behave strangely. Is this supported?
